summary: Verified 5 targeted changes on ApplianceRepairPageNew.js for city pages (daly-city, millbrae). 8/9 tests PASS. One intermittent issue found with BreadcrumbList dedup due to race condition with UniversalBreadcrumb.js.

minor_observations.issue: INTERMITTENT: Sometimes 2 BreadcrumbList schemas appear (universal-breadcrumb-schema + breadcrumb-schema-Appliance Repair). Race condition between UniversalBreadcrumb.js 300ms timeout and useSchemas hook.
minor_observations.note: The dedup logic in ApplianceRepairPageNew.js (lines 243-252) works correctly within its own schemas. The issue is UniversalBreadcrumb.js sometimes doesn't detect the page-specific schema in time.

minor_observations.observation: Inline style correctly has 'display: inline-flex' but computed style shows 'flex'. This is browser normalization when element is inside a flex container - functionally equivalent. All other properties (minHeight:44px, padding:10px 16px, alignItems:center) are correct.

1_service_schema.details: Service JSON-LD schema exists with @type:'Service', name='Appliance Repair in [City]', provider.@type='LocalBusiness', provider.name='FixitBay LLC', areaServed.@type='City', offers.price='60'

2_breadcrumb_dedup.details: Sometimes shows 1 BreadcrumbList (PASS), sometimes shows 2 (FAIL). Race condition with UniversalBreadcrumb.js - NOT part of the 5 targeted changes
schemas_observed: universal-breadcrumb-schema (2 items: Home > City Appliance Repair)
breadcrumb-schema-Appliance Repair (3 items: Home > Service Areas > City)

3_faq_schema.details: FAQPage JSON-LD schema present with 6 questions

4_section6_h2.details: Section 6 (city-cta-banner) contains H2 with text 'Need Appliance Repair in [City] Today?'

5_section13_h3.details: Section 13 (city-final-cta) contains H3 (NOT H2) with text 'Need Appliance Repair in [City]?' - H2 to H3 change confirmed

6_faq_buttons_touch.details: FAQ buttons (city-faq-q-0, etc) have minHeight=48px, actual height=48px

7_neighborhood_pills.details: Inline style has display:inline-flex, minHeight:44px, padding:10px 16px, alignItems:center. Computed shows display:flex due to flex container normalization - functionally correct.

8_hero_section.details: Hero renders with H1, book button, call button, trust badges

9_desktop_viewport.details: Page renders correctly on 1920x1080 viewport, all 5 key sections visible

targeted_changes_verified.1_service_schema_added: PASS - Service schema exists with correct structure
targeted_changes_verified.2_breadcrumblist_dedup_logic: PARTIAL - Dedup logic in ApplianceRepairPageNew.js works, but UniversalBreadcrumb.js race condition causes intermittent duplicates
targeted_changes_verified.3_h2_to_h3_change: PASS - Section 13 correctly uses H3 instead of H2
targeted_changes_verified.5_neighborhood_pills_styles: PASS - minHeight:44px, display:inline-flex (in inline style), padding:10px 16px, alignItems:center

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix BreadcrumbList race condition between UniversalBreadcrumb.js and page-specific schemas. Options: (1) Increase UniversalBreadcrumb delay, (2) Have page components signal they have their own breadcrumb, (3) Move dedup logic to UniversalBreadcrumb
critical_code_review_comments: ApplianceRepairPageNew.js dedup logic (lines 243-252) only deduplicates within its own pageSchemas array. It cannot prevent UniversalBreadcrumb.js from also injecting a schema.
UniversalBreadcrumb.js check (lines 31-37) should skip if page-specific schema exists, but 300ms delay may not be long enough for useSchemas to have injected its schema yet.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified 5 targeted changes on ApplianceRepairPageNew.js city pages. All pass except intermittent BreadcrumbList duplication (race condition with UniversalBreadcrumb.js - not part of the 5 changes). The inline 'display: inline-flex' on neighborhood pills correctly appears in inline style even though computed style shows 'flex' (browser normalization in flex containers).
